PowerShell($msg = "fix: stricter Step 3 document validation with amber/green badges and warnings`n`nBadge is green \(Fulfilled\) for file/vault, amber \(Confirmed\) for checkbox-only.`nWarning banner shows above Submit when all docs are confirm-only.`nFinal guard in submitWizard highlights unfulfilled cards in red.`nVault button shows active state and syncs vault_document_id to hidden input.`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"; git -C "D:\\final project" commit -m $msg)

PowerShell($msg = "feat: citizen dashboard receipt links and My Applications tracking page`n`nProblem 1 - Dashboard appointment cards: eager load application relation and`nshow View Receipt and Track Status buttons when an Application record exists.`n`nProblem 2 - New /citizen/track page \(citizen.applications.index\): lists all`napplications with status badge, tracking code, appointment details, latest`nstatus log preview, View Full Timeline and Download Receipt actions.`nSidebar and mobile nav Track link now points to this personal overview.`nPublic /track/{code} page is unchanged.`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"; git -C "D:\\final project" commit -m $msg)
